title: Multimedia distribution
summary: Media distribution work supporting dual-output high-definition server delivery.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on equipment, installed technical systems or physical signal paths operating in a physical environment.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Physical-system responsibility: Media distribution work supporting dual-output high-definition server delivery.
